title: Explosions reported
description: The psychological obstacle course at the Training Center of the SBS of the ZSU Smuga has 14 obstacles. It simulates conditions close to combat: FPV-drone attacks and countering them, evacuation of wounded with the use of NRC, constant noise, explosions, smoke, limited visibility, physical exertion and working in a group under pressure. The first to cross the line are officers from various divisions who arrived at the SBS Center on...

It simulates conditions close to combat: FPV-drone attacks and countering them, evacuation of wounded with the use of NRC, constant noise, explosions, smoke, limited visibility, physical exertion and working in a group under pressure. The first to cross the line are officers from various divisions who arrived at the SBS Center on...

Вона моделює умови, наближені до бойових: атаки FPV-дронів і протидію їм, евакуацію поранених із застосуванням НРК, постійний шум, вибухи, дим, обмежену видимість, фізичне навантаження та роботу в групі під тиском. Першими смугу проходять офіцери з різних підрозділів, які прибули до НЦ СБС на...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: General Staff: Russia has lost 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since Feb. 24, 2022. Russia has lost around 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since the beginning of its full-scale invasion on Feb. 24, 2022, the General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine reported on May 2. The number includes 1,240 casualties that Russian forces suffered over the past day.
description_en: General Staff: Russia has lost 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since Feb. 24, 2022. The number includes 1,240 casualties that Russian forces suffered over the past day.

description: Seven victims in Kherson after a Russian FPV-drone attack on a regular city bus are being provided with the necessary medical assistance. Unfortunately, two people died. My condolences to family and friends. All the victims during the attack were civilians, and the Russians certainly understood that. In fact, such a cruel safari is carried out on people every day in our frontline and border communities. In Kharkiv, a drone hit a residential...

My condolences to family and friends. All the victims during the attack were civilians, and the Russians certainly understood that. In fact, such a cruel safari is carried out on people every day in our frontline and border communities. In Kharkiv, a drone hit a residential...
description_uk: Сімом постраждалим у Херсоні після російського удару FPV-дроном по звичайній міській маршрутці надають необхідну медичну допомогу. На жаль, двоє людей загинуло. Мої співчуття рідним та близьким. Усі постраждалі під час атаки – цивільні, і росіяни точно це розуміли. Фактично таке жорстоке сафарі на людей щодня в наших прифронтових і прикордонних громадах. У Харкові дрон вдарив по житловій...

title: Drone attack on residential area
description: In Kharkov at night, Shahed flew into an apartment of a residential building on the 12th floor. Fortunately, the combat unit did not detonate, so the owner of the apartment escaped with a slight fright and a shrapnel wound, although everything could have been much worse. In addition to the attack on Kharkov at night, the Armed Forces of the Russian Federation also struck Ukrainian ports on the Danube (Izmail) and in the region of Bolshoi Odesa, the seaport administration reports. There is a damaged mooring...

description_uk: В Харькове ночью Шахед влетел в квартиру жилого дома на 12 этаже К счастью, боевая часть не сдетонировала, поэтому хозяин квартиры отделался легким испугом и осколочным ранением, хотя все могло быть намного хуже. Кроме атаки по Харькову ночью ВС РФ нанесли также удары по украинским портам на Дунае (Измаил) и в районе Большой Одессы, сообщает администрация морских портов. Там повреждена причальная...

description: Russia targets infrastructure across Ukraine in overnight drone attacks. Russian forces launched overnight attacks targeting critical and energy infrastructure across several Ukrainian regions early on May 2. Drone strikes were reported in Mykolaiv, Kryvyi Rih, and Odesa Oblasts, according to regional authorities and local reports.

title: Air defense active
description: Ukrainian innovative development of intercepting drones "Octopus" has proven its effectiveness in combat conditions. The Octopus-100 unmanned aerial vehicle interceptor was developed by servicemen of the Armed Forces of Ukraine under the coordination of the Central Department of Innovative Activities of the Armed Forces of Ukraine. The system was created by the military for the military and is equipped with an automatic homing module with elements of artificial...

The Octopus-100 unmanned aerial vehicle interceptor was developed by servicemen of the Armed Forces of Ukraine under the coordination of the Central Department of Innovative Activities of the Armed Forces of Ukraine. The system was created by the military for the military and is equipped with an automatic homing module with elements of artificial...

Безпілотний літальний апарат-перехоплювач "Октопус-100" розроблений військовослужбовцями Збройних Сил України за координації Центрального управління інноваційної діяльності ЗСУ. Система створена військовими для військових і оснащена модулем автоматичного донаведення з елементами штучного...

title: Missile launch detected
description: 🤬 Russia released a record 6,583 long-range drones over Ukraine in April, - AFP Reportedly, the number of launches increased by 2% compared to March. At the same time, the Russian Federation began to strike more often during the day, which is connected with the demand to increase civilian casualties. The number of missiles also increased to 141, although this is less than in February. According to the data of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in April it was possible to intercept about 88% of all targets.
description_en: 🤬 Russia released a record 6,583 long-range drones over Ukraine in April, - AFP Reportedly, the number of launches increased by 2% compared to March. At the same time, the Russian Federation began to strike more often during the day, which is connected with the demand to increase civilian casualties. The number of missiles also increased to 141, although this is less than in February. According to the data of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in April it was possible to intercept about 88% of all targets.
description_uk: 🤬 россия выпустила рекордные 6583 дальнобойных дрона по Украине в апреле, - AFP Как сообщается, количество запусков выросло на 2% по сравнению с мартом. Одновременно рф стала чаще наносить удары днем, что связывается с попыткой увеличить потери среди гражданских. Число ракет также выросло до 141, хотя это меньше, чем в феврале. По данным ВС ВСУ, в апреле удалось перехватить около 88% всех целей.
